{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Shyrax's gold force-blade
| introduced = The Engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Shyrax has a gold [[force-blade]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c4">''The Engineer'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
